title: Weekend Crepes
description: A tender, lightly sweet crepe base for breakfast spreads, fruit fillings, or savory brunch plates.

data.summary: A simple recipe rendered from structured JSON content.

items: For savory crepes, skip the sugar and add chopped herbs.
Leftover crepes keep well between sheets of parchment in the refrigerator.

steps: Whisk the flour, sugar, and salt in a mixing bowl.
Add the eggs and half the milk, then whisk until smooth.
Whisk in the remaining milk and melted butter.
Rest the batter for 10 minutes while a nonstick pan warms over medium heat.
Pour a thin layer of batter into the pan, swirl, and cook until the edges lift.
Flip and cook briefly on the second side, then repeat with the remaining batter.
